components.content: Time (2:20), Network Signal, Wi-Fi, Battery Icon (55%)

components.title: GK
components.subtitle: Beginner
components.illustration: Person with glasses, laptop, thought bubble

layout_structure: The screen features a fixed top app bar with navigation and status indicators. Below this, the content area is vertically stacked. The first content section presents two smaller action cards ('Redeem', 'Rate Us') in a horizontal 2-column grid. The subsequent content consists of larger, full-width category cards ('MATHS', 'GK', 'SCIENCE') arranged in a vertical list. The category card section is implicitly scrollable. The entire layout is structured using a prominent card-based design, providing clear visual separation for each functional area and content type. The Android system navigation bar is fixed at the bottom.

spacing_and_density.header_padding: Generous horizontal and vertical padding for elements within the app bar.
spacing_and_density.card_margins: Consistent vertical margins between the app bar, action cards section, and category cards. Clear horizontal spacing between the two action cards. Standard horizontal margins from screen edges for all cards.
spacing_and_density.card_internal_padding: Ample internal padding within each card around icons/illustrations and text, ensuring content breathing room.
spacing_and_density.overall_density: Moderately dense. The use of large cards and clear visual separation prevents clutter, despite many elements. Good use of whitespace around and within components.
spacing_and_density.touch_target_size: Large touch targets, especially for all cards, enhancing usability.

accessibility_observations: Good color contrast for white text on the teal header and black text on a white background.

Category card titles (e.g., MATHS, GK) have good contrast on their respective gradient backgrounds due to their large size and bold weight. Smaller 'Beginner' text on gradients might be less ideal in some gradient areas but appears acceptable.
All interactive elements (icons, cards) appear to have sufficiently large touch target areas.
Icons are accompanied by clear text labels ('Redeem', 'Rate Us'), aiding understanding for users who may not recognize icons or have visual impairments.
Descriptive thematic illustrations on category cards enhance recognition and engagement.
notable_patterns: Hamburger Menu: Standard pattern for accessing main navigation or settings.
Card-based UI: Efficiently organizes diverse content (actions, categories) into distinct, tappable units.
Dashboard/Home Screen: Serves as a central hub for primary actions and content exploration.
Gamification Elements: Presence of a currency/points system ('27') to encourage user engagement and reward.
Thematic Illustrations: Visually rich icons for each category enhance user experience and content distinction.
Gradient Backgrounds: Used extensively on cards for visual appeal and to differentiate sections.
